title: viola helleriana
intro: Viola helleriana, also known as American dog violet, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola helleriana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Viola helleriana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and its flowers and leaves can also be used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
